---
title: "CV"
---

## Education

Heriot-Watt University    | Edinburgh, UK | PhD in Economics                | Sep 2022 - 

University Of Edinburgh   | Edinburgh, UK | MSc in Economics (Econometrics) | Sep 2021 - August 2022

Heriot-Watt University    | Edinburgh, UK | MA in Economics                 | Sep 2017 - June 2021

## Grants and Awards

Economic and Social Research Council full PhD stipend. Through the Scottish Graduate School of Social Sciences.

<!-- Watt Club Medal  -->

<!-- ## Experience

Wengo Analytics | Head Data Scientist | April 2018 - present

GeoScynce | Chief Analyst | Spet 2012 - April 2018 -->
